message:
web: Add special rendering for Task tool calls

- Show subagent_type as title (e.g.,

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/ot69s6vanp0rud4j2r88hble"Explore") with fallback to "Task"
- Display input.description or truncated prompt in collapsed view
- Show duration in collapsed header (e.g., "38.7s")
- Render prompt and output as markdown when expanded
- Display images below collapsible like MCP tools
- Use ClaudeCodeIcon for task agent branding
